features: CHIC SUMMER DAISIES DESIGN: The Lesser & Pavey Lynsey Johnstone Summer Daisies Stemless Glass features a vibrant and beautiful floral pattern, perfect for adding a touch of summer charm to your drinks, whether at home or a celebration.
VERSATILE FOR ANY OCCASION: Ideal for parties, weddings, or a casual evening at home, this stemless glass is the perfect addition to your tableware, elevating both informal and formal gatherings.

HIGH-QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP: Made from durable and premium-quality glass, the Summer Daisies stemless glass combines style and functionality. Its elegant floral design enhances the drinking experience while being practical for daily use.

THOUGHTFUL GIFT CHOICE: Whether it's a birthday, wedding, or holiday celebration, this stemless glass makes a delightful gift. A great present for women, men, and anyone who appreciates unique and beautiful drinkware.

ELEVATE YOUR DRINKING EXPERIENCE: Perfect for holding wine, cocktails, or any favorite beverage, the Lesser & Pavey Lynsey Johnstone Summer Daisies Stemless Glass is designed to enhance your drinking experience with elegance and style.
